transcript.text:
[Why is she so serious?] [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
I didn't think she'd order this much Really
I ordered 10 toasts
[It's not just a regular toast]
[With quality cooking skills]
[Tasty, fresh, and big!]
[Premium toasts]
[Eat it like this]
[And like that]
[It really doesn't matter]
[No matter how much you think about it]
It's more than a toast!
We never had anything like this as kids
You can get them to-go as well
[Well in that case...]
[In boxes?!]

[They're going to be out of ingredients today...]
Hello everyone
I'm here to eat some toasts
I'm in front of the store
[Tegg42] [Sillim Location] Very cute, right?
Let's head inside
Hello!
Welcome to Tegg42...
[Great teamwork]
Again? I'll come in again
Hello
Hello, it's Tegg42
We've been waiting for you
Really?
For about 2 hours I think
[He's just kidding]

[Order from the kiosk]
How about like 10?
Garlic toast? French toast?
What's the difference?
The garlic toast has garlic sauce on the buns
The french toast is just with eggs
[Let's order them all]
Should I order the Crab Mayo as well?
-It's tasty -Is it?
Then let's get it
And...
Pizza too?
We're a premium store, so we do pizza as well
What's a premium store?
We serve pizza and beer on the side of the toast shop
No wonder the place was decorated so nicely for a toast place

[Simple & cute interior]
Just toasts for now
[Premium toast]
[With lots of butter]
[Egg yolk]
[Tegg42 style]
[Big-size]
-She's eating all of that? -I think she can eat even more
Pizza as well
[Unbelievable]
[Tegg42] [Premium toasts]
Your order is ready
No no no
I have to serve Tzuyang myself
No, it's really okay
Thank you

Can you eat all of this?
[Bigger than expected]
There's only 1 way to find out
That seems impossible
Tegg42 is a wonderful company that does a lot of charity work
-So eat up and please promote it for us -Okay
I ordered 10 toasts
The visuals go crazy
The toasts are completely packed
The quality is... wow This isn't a toast
[Some drinks to go with the toasts]
Thank you
Do you always bring the orders?
It's because it's Tzuyang
Thank you
But sir,

I heard that Tegg42 participates in helping starving children
And you're collaborating with me today to do charity work
Our headquarters and franchise stores continuously donate food to starving children
And since you're here with us today, the headquarters will be giving out 1,000 toasts to the children
Tegg42 supports our starving children,
And this time, they're donating 1,000 toasts
I will be taking part in helping them deliver a part of that
So I will do my best to eat them deliciously
We have 10 here for now
These 3 are the "big series"
What should I start with? Everything looks so good
[Buffering]
This is the Big Signature
It has 3 slices of bread
2 eggs as well That's very filling
How's this sauce this good?

The bread and the eggs are so soft that they melt in my mouth
The sauce is really tasty
These types of toasts are in trend
This has to be the best sauce for it
Savory and sweet,
But just the right amount of sweetness
It really melts in my mouth...
It has an omelette inside
It's very soft
Can't compare it with other egg dishes
I wonder if there's one near my house
It's just very tasty
It also feels healthy too
I don't know what to eat next
[Buffering]
Let's do the standard one next

Egg Plain
I love how I can taste the eggs
This really is a plain toast with just eggs
I love how it's just all eggs
So soft that it melts right away
[I don't remember ordering that...]
-Here's our pizza -Really?
We sell pizzas here at our premium location
And customers love it
No pressure
Just have a taste and to-go the leftovers
Really? Thank you
What kind of pizza is this?
Fish roe mayo shrimp pizza,
Bacon egg potato pizza
-Enjoy -Thank you

I've never had anything like it
You can definitely taste the roe mayo
It goes really well with this
Why is it so good?
A good pizza at a toast shop
It tastes like this
A lot of people eat toasts as their lunch or as a snack
I feel like the toast and the pizza would pair well with some beer
So good
But I have to focus on the toasts today, So I'll to-go those later
Big Rosé Shrimp Rosé is everywhere these days
This is really big
Perfect for a male adult
These regular ones are great for kids or the ladies
This is really chubby
How do I take a bite from this?

[And she does it once again...]
Crab meat salad is delicious
It has rosé sauce
With strong tomato flavors
I ate those pretty quick
Next
Bulgogi looks good (marinated beef)
It has real bulgogi meat inside
Better texture than bulgogi beef patties
The sauce is great too
I don't want to finish this It's too good
But this is...
This is like a food dish
Something above a toast-tier
These eggs are too good to be in a toast
And the toppings as well taste very healthy

It really feels like a real dish
We never had anything like this as kids
Which one next?
Egg Ham Cheese, and Double Cheese Bacon
One has bacon and cheese
The other one has ham and bacon
Actually, that's this one
What am I saying?
This one has cheese and bacon,
And this has ham & cheese
They look similar
Plain eggs with cheese & ham
I've been eating toasts, but it's still very good
I'm not sick of the taste maybe because of the sauce
Every bite feels like a new bite
It's a magical sauce

Ham & cheese is so good
Perfect to grab and go when you're busy
Maybe like 3 of them
[Crab Mayo Toast]
That's a lot
Soft
I feel like this is popular as well
It's hard to try something new, but once you do, It'll become a "go-to"
How do they make it this soft?
They use the ingredients as soon as they're made
Maybe that's why
It feels very clean and fresh
Toasts come out better than burgers these days
So good
I know that you're the best in the field
But I feel like this is a little too much even for you

Show us what's up
[Don't you worry...]
[It's just hard to decide what to eat next]
Triple egg
It has 3 different types of eggs
Egg salad, omelette, and soft-boiled
That's so good Very savory
This is an explosion of protein
Eggs are protein, right?
[The food must be good because she stopped talking...]
[It's that time again...]
Let's do Tteok Galbi (Short rib patties)
Delicious
All these "beef patty" toasts are so good
These are often called K-toasts
These toasts are popular in South Korea, but

They're also very popular outside of our country So there are a lot of shops opening-up
They really took time in inventing these foods
Even like buldak (fire chicken)
And they're still inventing
I'll try their new menu when it's out
[Are we shivering...?]
[Which one next?]
This is the cheese bacon
Egg, omelette, cheese, bacon
I never get tired of this sauce
The cheese is good
It's less sweet because of the cheese
A little saltier
But goes well together
There's only 1 left already?
You're drinking a lot too...

9 cups total...
That's incredible
Last one Big volcano
The visuals... There's a reason why I saved this for last
What's in here?
Chicken breast
2 omelettes, chicken breast, pepperoni, and buldak sauce
My mouth does not have a limit
[Getting ready]
All the greasiness goes away completely
That's a lot of chicken breasts
A little spicy
[It's coming]
I'm awake now
It's spicy But it's a good spicy
[Is this okay...?]

The chicken breast is not dry It's juicy
[10 toasts, 2 slices of pizza, 9 cups of drinks cleared!]
[Congratulations]
[You're the best] Thank you
I'm shocked I didn't think she could do it
It's Tzuyang for a reason
It was very delicious
Thank you
When did she drink all of that?
[Toasts prepared by Tegg42]
[With Tzuyang]
[Tegg42 x Tzuyang] [Donating 1,000 toasts!]
We as Tegg42 were doing a campaign to donate toasts to the ones in need
It's an honor for us to be given this great opportunity to help our children in need with Tzuyang today
There are still so many children that need our helping hand So I would love it if the adults can give a little more effort in this matter
And lastly, please show Tegg42 lots of love and support

Please deliver these to our children with love [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
Thank you [A portion of the advertisement earnings will be donated to child welfare facilities to help children in need]
[Tegg42's toasts have been successfully delivered as "smiles" to various places that are in need]
[Part of the advertising revenue will be donated to 'Dasom Study Room' located in Seoul, Gwanak-gu, Samseong-dong] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
